name: ralph-wiggum
description: Ralph Wiggum loop for Claude Code: re-feed the SAME prompt every iteration via a Stop hook until a completion promise is detected or a max-iteration limit is hit. A self-referential, in-session iterative development loop. Adapted from Anthropic's official ralph-loop plugin (Apache-2.0).

author.name: Moiz Jamil
author.note: Adapted from Anthropic's official ralph-loop plugin (Apache-2.0). See LICENSE and README attribution.
